title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Luxury Bath Towels 4 Piece - Ultra Soft, Fluffy 100% Egyptian Cotton Towel Set - Quick Dry & Highly Water Absorbent Bathroom Towels - 500 GSM Large Towel (70x120 cm) - Natural
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: MATERIAL: Made from 100% Egyptian cotton for exceptional softness and comfort. The bundle Include 4 bath towel (70x120cm).
SUPER ABSORBENT: Quickly absorbs moisture, making it perfect for daily use and drying off after a shower.
QUICK-DRY: Designed to dry fast, reducing dampness and keeping towels fresh for longer.
CHEMICAL-FREE: Crafted without harsh chemicals, ensuring a safe and eco-friendly choice for your home.
EASY CARE INSTUCTIONS: Machine washable, avoid hard detergents, don’t iron, and keep away from fire for best results.
description: GREEK TOWELS ★ The super-soft material feels luxuriously smooth against your skin, ideal for helping you keep warm and dry off in comfort after your cleansing routine ★ Dry off quickly and efficiently with these stunning towels, expertly designed to soak up moisture in addition to looking fabulous in your home! ★ Created from high-quality, machine washable fabric, these fabulous towels could not be simpler to care for in the convenience of your own home ★ Whatever your bathroom look, you can find the perfect shade to match from among our exquisite towel set. ★ Material Composition: 100% Egyptian Cotton ★ Set Includes: 4PK Hand Towel : 50 cm x 80 cm 4PKBath Towel: 70 cm x 120 cm 2PK Bath Sheet : 80 cm x 140 cm 2PK Jumbo Bath Sheet : 80 cm x 170 cm ★ Caring Instructions: Machine Washable at 40° C Wash Dark Colors Separately Do Not Bleach Keep Away From Fire Do Not Iron Keep Away From Fire ★ Brand: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA®

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Do Not Bleach, Do Not Iron, Keep Away From Fire, Machine Wash, Wash Dark Colors Separately
